--client-cert-file.description: File containing client certificate for SSL/TLS connections (PKCS#12 or PEM-encoded)

--client-cert-key-file.description: File containing PEM encoded client certificate private key for SSL/TLS connections

--client-cert-key-password-file.description: File containing password for client certificate private key (if key is encrypted). If key file is encrypted, but this option is not set, password will be asked interactively

--password-file.description: File with password to authenticate with

--no-password.description: Do not ask for user password (if empty)

--allocator-info.description: Print the name of allocator linked to the binary and exit

--compatibility-info.description: Print compatibility info of this binary and exit

init.description: Initialize and manage blobstorage config using yaml description

--yaml-file.description: read blobstorage config from yaml file

--domain.description: availability domain

invoke.description: Query or update blob storage configuration

--domain.description: availability domain

propose.name: propose
propose.description: Configuration proposition for migration and initial configuring

storage-pools.name: storage-pools
storage-pools.description: Propose cluster Storage Pool configuration for migration

--domain.description: availability domain

{-d|--disk-size}.description: disk size to set (supports K/M/G/T suffixes, 0 to autodetect, default = 0) kikimr needs disk of at least 16 GiB, disk must be large enough to contain at least 100 chunks

{-c|--chunk-size}.description: chunk size to set (supports K/M/G/T suffixes, default = 128M) kikimr needs chunks of at least 32 MiB, but was designed to work with 128 MiB chunks in mind. It is not recommended to format disks with more than 64000 chunks.

{-s|--sector-size}.description: sector size to set (suppords K/M/G/T suffixes, default = 4k) you must specify here the actual sector size of the physical device!

{-k|--main-key}.description: encryption main-key to set while formatting. Make sure you use the same master key when you format your pdisks and when you run kikimr.

{-t|--text-message}.description: text message to store in format sector (up to 4000 characters long)

{-e|--erasure-encode}.description: erasure-encode data to recover from single-sector failures

{-k|--main-key}.description: encryption main-key to use while reading

{-l|--lock}.description: lock device before reading disk info

obliterate.name: obliterate
obliterate.description: Obliterate local disk, so it will be self-formatted on startup

clear-inheritance.description: Disable permission inheritance from the parent

{-R|--recursive}.description: Change owner on schema objects recursively

{-d|--details}.description: Show detailed information (like columns in a table)

{-P|--protobuf}.description: Debug print all info as is

ls.name: ls
ls.description: List schema object or path content

--breakpad-minidumps-path.description: Path for minidumps generated by internal breakpad

--breakpad-minidumps-script.description: Script for process minidumps generated by internal breakpad

--cluster-name.description: which cluster this node belongs to (default: "unknown")

--log-sampling-level.description: sample logs equal to or above this level (default: 7)

--log-sampling-rate.description: log only each Nth message with priority matching sampling level; 0 turns log sampling off (default: 0)

--log-format.description: log format to use; short skips the priority and timestamp (default: "full")

--syslog.description: send to syslog instead of stderr (default: 0)

{-n|--node}.description: Node ID or 'static' to auto-detect using naming file and ic-port.

--node-broker-port.description: node broker port (hosts from naming file are used)

--node-broker-use-tls.description: use tls for node broker (hosts from naming file are used)

--node-domain.description: domain for dynamic node to register in

--tenant.description: add binding for Local service to specified tenant, might be one of {'/<root>', '/<root>/<path_to_user>'}

--mon-key.description: Path to monitoring private key file (https)

--mon-ca.description: Path to CA certificate file for verifying client certificates (mTLS)

--suppress-version-check.description: Suppress version compatibility checking via IC (default: 0)

--grpcs-port.description: enable gRPC SSL server on port

--grpc-public-host.description: set public gRPC host for discovery

--grpc-public-port.description: set public gRPC port for discovery

--grpcs-public-port.description: set public gRPC SSL port for discovery

--kafka-port.description: enable kafka proxy to listen on port

--pgwire-address.description: set host for listen postgres protocol

--pgwire-port.description: set port for listen postgres protocol

--grpc-public-address-v4.description: set public ipv4 address for discovery

--grpc-public-address-v6.description: set public ipv6 address for discovery

--grpc-public-target-name-override.description: set public hostname override for TLS in discovery

{-r|--restarts-count-file}.description: State for restarts monitoring counter, use empty string to disable (default: "")

--udf.description: Load shared library with UDF by given path

--udfs-dir.description: Load all shared libraries with UDFs found in given directory

--node-kind.description: Kind of the node (affects list of services activated allowed values are {'ydb', 'yq'} )

--cert.description: Path to client certificate file (PEM) for interconnect

--grpc-cert.description: Path to client certificate file (PEM) for grpc

--ic-cert.description: Path to client certificate file (PEM) for interconnect

--key.description: Path to private key file (PEM) for interconnect

--grpc-key.description: Path to private key file (PEM) for grpc

--ic-key.description: Path to private key file (PEM) for interconnect

--ca.description: Path to certificate authority file (PEM) for interconnect

--grpc-ca.description: Path to certificate authority file (PEM) for grpc

--ic-ca.description: Path to certificate authority file (PEM) for interconnect

--data-center.description: data center name (used to describe dynamic node location)

--module.description: module name (used to describe dynamic node location)

--rack.description: rack name (used to describe dynamic node location)

--body.description: body name (used to describe dynamic node location)

--workload.description: Workload to be served by this node, allowed values are 'hybrid', 'analytical', 'operational'

--seed-nodes.description: Path to seed nodes configuration file

--force-database-labels.description: Forced reporting of a label with the name of the database (tenant/domain) (default: 0)

--feature-flags-file.description: File with feature flags to turn new features on/off

--incrhuge-file.description: incremental huge blob keeper config file

--memorylog-file.description: set buffer size for memory log

--sys-file.description: actor system config file (use dummy config by default)

--timeout.description: Client timeout. Supports time units (e.g., '5s', '1m'). Plain number interpreted as milliseconds.

{-a|--all}.description: Show all additional info (groups and access list)
